hero.title: Protect Your Strawberries with AI
hero.subtitle: Detect diseases, identify nutrient deficiencies, and get instant treatment recommendations for your strawberry plants using cutting-edge artificial intelligence.
hero.uploadPrompt: Upload an image to begin analysis

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to protect your strawberry plants

step1.title: Upload Image
step1.desc: Take a photo of your strawberry plant and upload it to our platform

step2.title: AI Analysis
step2.desc: Our AI analyzes the image to detect diseases and deficiencies

step3.title: Get Results
step3.desc: Receive instant diagnosis with detailed treatment recommendations

hero.title: The system that applies artificial intelligence in agriculture
hero.subtitle: Through this work, we seek smarter farming practices, improved crop quality, and reduced agricultural losses. Our AI-powered platform helps farmers detect strawberry diseases early and provides actionable treatment recommendations.

blog.title: Powerful Features
blog.subtitle: Comprehensive AI-powered disease detection and treatment recommendations

feature1.title: Detect Problems Early
feature1.desc: We detect strawberry diseases and nutrient deficiencies at an early stage before they spread and cause serious damage.

feature2.title: Accurate Analysis
feature2.desc: Upload a plant image and our AI analyzes the symptoms to identify the exact problem quickly and accurately.

feature3.title: Ready Solutions
feature3.desc: Once the issue is detected, we provide clear, ready-to-apply treatment recommendations to restore plant health.
